form.formComment: Resumes off a 55 day letup. Last start ran last in a small field at Ascot in the G2 Reynoldstown Novices' Chase on February 14 over 4800m, 15 len behind The Jukebox Kid carrying 71kg at $5.50. Before that ran last in a small field at Kempton Park in the G1 Kauto Star Novices Chase on December 26 over 4800m, 46 len behind Kitzbuhel with 73kg at $13. May struggle.

form.formComment: Resuming today after three months. Finished off last campaign 2 in a small field at Windsor in the G2 Hampton Novices' Chase January 18 over 4900m, slow track; 4.5 len behind Salver carrying 73kg at $13. Previously first up; ran last in a small field at Worcester September 15 over 3300m, 6 len behind Breaking Cover carrying 74.5kg at $5. In the mix.

form.formComment: Racing well. Resumes off a 29 day letup. Last start finished second of 18 starters at Cheltenham in the G2 THE GOLDEN MILLER on March 12 over 4100m, 5 len behind Meetmebythesea carrying 72kg at $26. Before that ran last in a small field at Navan in the G2 Ten Up Novice Chase on February 8 over 4828m, on rain affected going; 12 len behind Oscars Brother with 73.5kg at $2.60. Can go one better.

form.formComment: Freshened for 29 days. Last start finished eighth of 18 starters at Cheltenham in the G2 THE GOLDEN MILLER on March 12 over 4100m, 22 len behind Meetmebythesea carrying 70kg at $6.50. Race before ran on from midfield and won by a nose Cheltenham on January 24 over 4100m slow track defeating Quebecois carrying 75kg at $8 in a steeplechase. May return to winning ways.

form.formComment: Racing well. Freshened for 42 days. Last start to post a big 15 len win. Newbury on February 27 over 4700m defeating That's Nice carrying 73.5kg at $1.70 in a steeplechase. The run before came from midfield; finished third in a small field at Sandown Park in the G1 Scilly Isles Novices Chase on January 31 over 4000m, slow track; 6 len behind Sixmilebridge with 73kg at $15. Dangerous.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. First-up after two months finished third of 18 runners at Cheltenham in the G2 THE GOLDEN MILLER on March 12 over 4100m, 7 len behind Meetmebythesea with 72kg at $6. Previously second-up favourite; won by 4.5 len Wincanton on December 16 over 4000m slow going defeating Jeriko Du Reponet with 71.5kg at $1.40 in a steeplechase. Expected to challenge.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Resumes off a 30 day letup. Last run finished third of 14 runners at Cheltenham in the G1 Broadway Novices' Chase on March 11 over 5000m, 3 len behind Kitzbuhel with 73kg at $26. The start before to post a big 4.5 len win. Windsor in a G2 Hampton Novices' Chase on January 18 over 4900m slow going defeating Doyen Quest carrying 74kg at $2.40 in a jumps. Makes appeal.
